settings.heading: Send a clear support request with the context needed to act
settings.text: Use this page for order or product support, onboarding questions, service delivery issues, Business NBN support, membership help or guidance choosing the right pathway.

settings.heading: Include the details that help support route the request
settings.text: The clearer the request, the easier it is to route it to support, onboarding, advisory, implementation or the right product pathway.

settings.title: Order, product or service
settings.text: Include the order number, product name, service pathway or membership context when relevant.

settings.title: Issue and outcome
settings.text: Explain what is stuck, what has already happened and what outcome you need.

settings.title: Deadline or timing pressure
settings.text: Share any deadline, onboarding date, meeting, renewal, connectivity issue or delivery timing constraint.

settings.title: Sensitive information
settings.text: Do not send passwords, account credentials or unnecessary personal information through the public form.

settings.heading: Other places that may help
settings.text: Use these routes when the question is better handled by a support, resource or connectivity pathway.

settings.title: Support
settings.text: Choose a support route before sending a request.

settings.title: Help Centre
settings.text: Find common support and fulfilment guidance.

settings.title: Business NBN support
settings.text: Review connectivity support before submitting a Business NBN request.
